original_image_tags: A circular stamp in the upper left corner reads "U.S. ARMY SAVE WASTE SALVAGE PAPER".
A "FOR VICTORY BUY UNITED STATES WAR BONDS AND STAMPS" logo is in the upper right corner.

elements.description: Top left: A circular 'SAVE' stamp with 'U.S. ARMY' and 'AVIATION SERVICE' text. Top center: A crossed-out 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp. Top right: A rectangular 'FOR VICTORY BUY UNITED STATES WAR BONDS AND STAMPS' stamp featuring a soldier illustration. Bottom center: A crossed-out 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamp.

judge.reason: Description A quotes the circular stamp text as 'SAVE WASTE SALVAGE PAPER' while Description B reads the same stamp as 'AVIATION SERVICE', a direct contradiction on the verbatim text inside the same visual element.
